original_abstract: This paper discusses the study of philosophy, namely the ontology of TGKH thinking. M. Zainuddin Abdul Madjid about Islamic boarding school education. Furthermore this study examines the relevance of his educational thinking with education in Indonesia. The research methodology used is descriptive qualitative with a descriptive analysis approach. The results showed that TGKH. M. Zainuddin Abdul Madjid has succeeded in giving his education, guidance and education to the people of Lombok at that time with several concepts and practices, so that the people of Lombok have been able to understand and know about the teachings of Islam.
humanized_abstract: In this paper is discussing about the philosophy study, especially about the ontology of TGKH thinking. The studies of M. Zainuddin Abdul Madjid about Islamic boarding school education and examining the relevance with the education system in Indonesia. This research uses a descriptive qualitative method with a descriptive analysis approach. Through the research it can be concluded that TGKH has managed to spread the education, guidance and Islamic school education to the people of Lombok at that time through some concepts and methods. So that the people of Lombok have been able to understand and master the teachings of Islam.
